home.metaTitle: LOFTZ — Student & young-professional rooms in Lisbon
home.metaDescription: All-inclusive, fully furnished rooms across 9 residences in Lisbon. Cleaning, fast Wi-Fi, equipped kitchens and a registered contract included. Book directly with LOFTZ.
home.heroTagline: Find your next home in Lisbon
home.heroSubtitle: Fully furnished rooms with everything included — bills, cleaning and fast Wi-Fi. No booking fees, a registered lease agreement, and a team that actually answers. Just bring your bags.
home.expectSubtitle: Every LOFTZ room comes ready to live in — no setup, no surprises.
home.mapSubtitle: Nine buildings, each with its own character. Explore them on the map.
home.seoTitle: Room rental in Lisbon, done properly
home.seoBody: LOFTZ manages a portfolio of furnished rooms across Lisbon, designed for students and young professionals who want a home that just works. Rent is all-inclusive — utilities, cleaning of common areas and high-speed internet are covered — and every tenancy comes with a registered contract and receipts. Book directly with us and skip the platform fees.
home.ctaBody: Browse every available room, filter by what matters to you, and send a request in minutes.
home.howSubtitle: From first look to move-in — three simple steps.
home.how1_body: Explore rooms across nine Lisbon residences and find the ones that fit your budget and neighbourhood.
home.how2_body: Found one you like? Request a viewing in person or by video before you commit — no pressure.
home.how3_body: Own an apartment in Lisbon? Earn reliable monthly income while we handle tenants and upkeep.

expect.rent_body: One monthly payment covers utilities and common-area services — no hidden bills.
expect.cleaning_body: Regular cleaning of shared spaces keeps every residence comfortable.
expect.wifi_body: High-speed internet in every home, ready from day one.
expect.kitchen_body: Fully fitted kitchens with everything you need to cook and share meals.
expect.transport_body: Metro, bus and train connections a short walk from every residence.
expect.amenities_body: Supermarkets, cafés, gyms and universities within easy reach.
expect.maintenance_body: A responsive team fixes issues quickly so you don't have to.
expect.contract_body: A proper, registered tenancy contract with receipts — useful for visas and residency.

landlords.metaTitle: Guaranteed rental income for your Lisbon apartment
landlords.metaDescription: Hand us your Lisbon apartment and earn guaranteed monthly income with zero hassle. We furnish, market, manage tenants, maintain and pay you — every month, occupied or not.
landlords.title: Your apartment, earning — without the hassle
landlords.subtitle: Own an apartment in Lisbon? Hand it to LOFTZ and we turn it into reliable monthly income. We take on the tenants, the upkeep and the paperwork; you receive a fixed payment and keep the asset.
landlords.programsTitle: Two ways to work with us
landlords.programsSubtitle: Pick the level of involvement that suits you — both are fully hands-off.
landlords.guaranteed_tagline: A fixed rent, every month — occupied or empty
landlords.guaranteed_body: We sign a long-term lease for your apartment and pay you a fixed amount every single month, whether or not the rooms are filled. We carry all the vacancy and tenant risk. You get predictable, worry-free income and a property that's professionally looked after and returned in great condition.
guaranteed_points: Fixed monthly payment, voids are our problem
We furnish and upgrade at our cost
Property maintained and returned in top shape
landlords.managed_tagline: Keep the upside, lose the workload
landlords.managed_body: Prefer to keep the rental upside? We run your apartment end to end for a single management fee: furnishing, professional photos, listing across the top platforms, tenant screening, contracts, rent collection, cleaning and maintenance. You get an owner dashboard and one point of contact.
managed_points: Marketed across Uniplaces, Spotahome, HousingAnywhere & more
Rent collection, cleaning and maintenance handled
landlords.why1_body: We keep rooms filled and rent flowing — collections, late payments and empty months are our job, not yours.
landlords.why2_body: Regular cleaning, proactive maintenance and a responsive team keep your apartment in excellent condition.
landlords.why3_body: Registered contracts, receipts and tax-compliant paperwork — everything by the book, handled for you.
landlords.why4_body: Under-used or dated apartment? We can furnish, renovate and reposition it to lift its income before we manage or lease it.
landlords.how1_body: Share the address, size and a few photos. It takes two minutes.
landlords.how2_body: We visit, value the rental potential and come back with a guaranteed-income figure or a management plan.
landlords.how3_body: We furnish, photograph and list your apartment — or take over the existing tenancy.
landlords.how4_body: Rent lands in your account every month while we run everything day to day.
landlords.ctaTitle: Find out what your apartment could earn
landlords.ctaBody: Send us a few details and we'll come back with a no-obligation proposal.

contact.title: Send us a message
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Thanks for reaching out — we'll reply by email shortly.
contact.error: We couldn't send your message. Please try again or email us directly.

faq.metaDescription: Answers about booking, rent, contracts, deposits and living in a LOFTZ residence.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about renting with LOFTZ.
faq.stillBody: Can't find what you're looking for? Send us a message and we'll help.

items.q: How do I book a room?
items.a: Browse available rooms, open the one you like and send a booking request with your details and dates. We'll confirm availability and next steps by email — no account needed.

items.q: Do I pay any booking fees?
items.a: No. Booking directly with LOFTZ is free — there are no service or booking fees, unlike the listing platforms. You pay your rent and a security deposit, nothing extra to us for booking.
Rent is all-inclusive: water, electricity, gas, cleaning of common areas and high-speed internet are covered. Your monthly payment is what you see on the room page.
Yes, a security deposit is typically required and refunded at the end of your stay, subject to the condition of the room. The exact amount and terms are in your contract.

items.q: Do I get a registered contract?
items.a: Yes. Every tenancy comes with a proper, registered rental contract and receipts — useful for visa, residency and NIF applications.
Minimum stay varies by room and is shown in the booking conditions on each room page. Most rooms suit a semester or academic-year stay.

items.q: How do I pay the rent?
items.a: Rent is paid monthly, usually by bank transfer. We'll share the payment details and schedule once your booking is confirmed.
Absolutely. Use the "Schedule a visit" option on any room page and we'll arrange a time — in person or a video walkthrough if you're abroad.

items.q: I'm moving from another country — can I book from abroad?
items.a: Yes. Most of our guests book before arriving in Lisbon. We handle everything remotely, including the contract, so your room is ready when you land.
Each room lists its own conditions (for example minimum age, minimum stay, and rules on smoking, parties or pets). You'll see them on the room page and confirm them when you request to book.
Mostly students and young professionals aged 18–30, both Portuguese and international — a friendly, respectful community.
Just tell us. Maintenance is included — our team fixes issues quickly so you don't have to deal with it.

items.q: How soon will I hear back after requesting?
items.a: Usually within one business day. We'll email you to confirm availability and walk you through the next steps.

about.metaDescription: LOFTZ manages a portfolio of furnished rooms across Lisbon for students and young professionals.
about.title: About LOFTZ
about.body1: LOFTZ manages a portfolio of furnished rooms across nine residences in Lisbon. We built LOFTZ around a simple idea: renting a room in a new city should be easy, transparent and comfortable.
about.body2: Every room is ready to live in from day one — furnished, connected and all-inclusive — with a registered contract and a team that actually answers. We look after the buildings so our residents can focus on studying, working and enjoying Lisbon.
about.body3: We host students and young professionals from across the world, and we book directly — so there are no platform fees between you and your new home.
about.body4: We also work hand in hand with property owners. Many of our residences are apartments we lease or manage on owners' behalf — furnishing them, filling them with great tenants and running them day to day. It's how we grow our portfolio while giving landlords reliable, hands-off income. If you own an apartment in Lisbon, we'd love to talk.
about.value1_body: All-inclusive prices, registered contracts and no hidden fees. What you see is what you pay.
about.value2_body: Furnished, well-kept homes in connected neighbourhoods, ready from day one.
about.value3_body: A responsive local team that answers quickly — before and throughout your stay.
about.contactBody: Questions about a room, a stay or working with us? Send a message and we'll get back to you.

legal.draftNotice: Draft for review — not yet legally binding. Final wording will be confirmed with legal counsel before launch.
legal.complaintsBookNote: In line with Portuguese law, you can submit a complaint through the official electronic complaints book.

consent.title: We value your privacy
consent.body: We use cookies to run this site and, with your consent, to measure traffic so we can improve it. No analytics or advertising cookies are set until you accept.
